title: DIGI-METER - Measuring Digital Competence for Resilient Learning Ecosystems
description: DIGI-METER is an Erasmus+ Forward-Looking project developing AI-supported tools, dashboards, and indicators based on DigComp 2.2 to measure and improve digital skills in schools and vocational training.

strings.source: DIGI-METER turns DigComp 2.2 into practical, inclusive and evidence-based tools for learners, educators and institutions across Europe.
strings.value: DIGI-METER turns DigComp 2.2 into practical, inclusive and evidence-based tools for learners, educators and institutions across Europe.

strings.source: What the project is, who it serves, and the DigComp 2.2 framework behind it.
strings.value: What the project is, who it serves, and the DigComp 2.2 framework behind it.

strings.source: Measuring Digital Competence for Resilient Learning Ecosystems
strings.value: Measuring Digital Competence for Resilient Learning Ecosystems

strings.source: DIGI-METER responds to a key challenge in European education systems: while the DigComp 2.2 framework clearly defines the competences citizens need in digital environments, its practical use in schools and vocational education and training is still fragmented. DIGI-METER helps bridge this gap by translating DigComp 2.2 into measurable indicators, practical assessment tools, and clear feedback for learners, educators, and institutions.
strings.value: DIGI-METER responds to a key challenge in European education systems: while the DigComp 2.2 framework clearly defines the competences citizens need in digital environments, its practical use in schools and vocational education and training is still fragmented. DIGI-METER helps bridge this gap by translating DigComp 2.2 into measurable indicators, practical assessment tools, and clear feedback for learners, educators, and institutions.

strings.source: AI-Supported Tools for Schools, VET Providers & Policymakers
strings.value: AI-Supported Tools for Schools, VET Providers & Policymakers

strings.source: Through the project, partners will develop AI-supported self-assessment tools, a teacher dashboard, and open resources that help schools, VET providers, and policymakers better understand, monitor, and improve digital skills. The tools are designed to support personalised learning, evidence-based decision-making, and more consistent digital competence assessment across different educational contexts.
strings.value: Through the project, partners will develop AI-supported self-assessment tools, a teacher dashboard, and open resources that help schools, VET providers, and policymakers better understand, monitor, and improve digital skills. The tools are designed to support personalised learning, evidence-based decision-making, and more consistent digital competence assessment across different educational contexts.

strings.source: A strong focus is placed on ethics, inclusion, accessibility, and data protection. DIGI-METER follows an ethics-by-design approach, with attention to transparency, GDPR compliance, fairness, explainability, and user control.
strings.value: A strong focus is placed on ethics, inclusion, accessibility, and data protection. DIGI-METER follows an ethics-by-design approach, with attention to transparency, GDPR compliance, fairness, explainability, and user control.

strings.source: DIGI-METER combines expertise in digital education, pedagogical design, psychometrics, AI, software development, piloting, communication, dissemination, ethics, accessibility, and policy transfer.
strings.value: DIGI-METER combines expertise in digital education, pedagogical design, psychometrics, AI, software development, piloting, communication, dissemination, ethics, accessibility, and policy transfer.
